channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Maternal use of benzodiazepines and non-benzodiazepine hypnotics is not associated with increased risk of psychiatric
item.description: 1. Maternal use of benzodiazepines or non-benzodiazepine hypnotics (Z-hypnotics) during pregnancy was not associated with an increased risk of psychia...

item.title: Hantavirus is on the rise in Argentina, where a stricken cruise ship began its journey
item.description: Officials and experts in Argentina are scrambling to determine if their country is the source of a deadly hantavirus outbreak that has gripped an Atla...

item.title: Digital therapy outperforms referrals to campus clinics among college students
item.description: College students with anxiety, depression and eating disorders may be more likely to start and to respond more positively to therapy offered via a dig...

item.title: HCM Linked to Higher Risk for Out-of-Hospital Cardiac Arrest
item.description: Hypertrophic cardiomyopathy is associated with an increased long term risk for out of hospital cardiac arrest, especially if diagnosed later in life o...
